title: My Work - not showing all tasks
excerpt: Experiencing issues with the my work section. it is not filtering through all tasks, so for example we have 10 tasks overdue, but only 4 display on my work. however if you go onto your project board and filter for sub ta…

posts.author: gill.venables (Gill)
posts.cookedHtml: Experiencing issues with the my work section. it is not filtering through all tasks, so for example we have 10 tasks overdue, but only 4 display on my work. however if you go onto your project board and filter for sub tasks with a past date they then show. Anyone got any ideas on what to check or resolve this?

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @gill.venables,

Is there any chance that you may have reached the limit of 250 boards or 1000 items?

image1218×351 23.9 KB

This screenshot is from this Monday.com article https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360019300579-My-Work#:~:text=Note%3A%20There%20is%20a%20limit,once%20the%20limit%20is%20reached.

posts.author: gill.venables (Gill)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks, however we are definitely well within these limits, we only have 3 boards, and not over 500 tasks!

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
